channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Washington State hires Jimmy Rogers: What his contract says about the school’s commitment to football
item.description: Rogers, hired away from South Dakota State, will earn 40 percent less than his predecessor, Jake Dickert.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Burrow throws 3-yard TD pass to Higgins in OT as the Bengals beat the Broncos 30-24
item.description: CINCINNATI (AP) — This time, near the very end of a mostly agonizing season, the Cincinnati Bengals made enough plays to win. A familiar connection closed it out.
item.dc:creator: MITCH STACY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Dallas' Naji Marshall gets 4-game suspension, Phoenix's Jusuf Nurkic is banned 3 games for fight
item.description: The NBA suspended Dallas Mavericks forward Naji Marshall for four games and Phoenix Suns center Jusuf Nurkic for three games for their roles in an on-court fight during Friday night's game. Dallas forward P.J. Washington was suspended one game. The suspensions handed down Saturday are without pay.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Miami's Cam Ward sets NCAA's Division I record with 156th career touchdown pass
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Cam Ward made NCAA history in his final college game. The Miami quarterback threw a record-setting 156th touchdown pass of his college career Saturday, connecting with Jacolby George for a 4-yard score with 4:12 left in the first quarter of the Pop-Tarts Bowl against Iowa State.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Justin Herbert tosses 3 TDs, Chargers clinch a playoff spot with a 40-7 rout of Patriots
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. (AP) — Justin Herbert threw three touchdown passes and the Los Angeles Chargers clinched their second playoff appearance in three seasons with a 40-7 victory over the New England Patriots on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ed Greene, ‘a real trailblazer’ as Contra Costa basketball coach, dies at 83
item.description: Ed Greene represented Contra Costa College for parts of five decades as a player, coach and administrator
item.dc:creator: Evan Webeck, The Mercury News

item.title: Chicago brings losing streak into matchup with Dallas
item.description: Dallas Stars (20-13-1, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (12-22-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Sunday, 8:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks look to break their three-game skid when they play the Dallas Stars.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Southern California overcomes 17-point deficit to beat Texas A&M 35-31 in Las Vegas Bowl
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The Southern California Trojans ended their season the way they started it. On Sept. 1 at Allegiant Stadium in the opener, the Trojans overcame a third-quarter deficit and scored with eight seconds left to beat LSU 27-20.
item.dc:creator: W.G. RAMIREZ, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: McCord throws for 453 yards, 5 TDs in No. 22 Syracuse's 52-35 Holiday Bowl win over Washington State
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Kyle McCord threw for 453 yards and five touchdowns to break Deshaun Watson's Atlantic Coast Conference season passing record and lead No. 22 Syracuse to a 52-35 victory over depleted-yet-scrappy Washington State in the Holiday Bowl on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shaq Barrett expected to re-sign with Bucs after being waived by Dolphins, reports say
item.description: Former Tampa Bay Buccaneers linebacker Shaq Barrett is expected to once again sign with the Bucs after he was waived by the Miami Dolphins, according to multiple reports.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, WFLA, NBC

item.title: LeBron James trolled for saying Christmas belongs to NBA after NFL viewership is revealed
item.description: LeBron James declared Christmas "our day," but the NFL had nearly 20 million more viewers than the NBA throughout the holiday this week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL legend Eric Dickerson keeps it brutally honest about Saquon Barkley chasing his rushing record
item.description: Saquon Barkley is 268 yards away from becoming the NFL's single-season rushing record holder, but Eric Dickerson is rooting for Barkley to come up short.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Central Michigan quarterback Tommy Lazzaro, 27, killed in hunting accident
item.description: Former Central Michigan quarterback Tommy Lazzaro, who served as a sergeant in the U.S. Army, was tragically killed in a hunting accident over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bulls take on the Bucks on 3-game skid
item.description: Milwaukee Bucks (16-13, fifth in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (13-18, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Chicago enters the matchup against Milwaukee after losing three straight games. The Bulls are 2-5 against division opponents.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Former NCAA quarterback Tommy Lazzaro dies in 'tragic' accident at US Air Force base
item.description: Tommy Lazzaro, an Army sergeant and former quarterback for the Central Michigan Chippewas, has died following an accident at Eglin Air Force Base in Florida. He was 27.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, Fox 5

item.title: Bulls blow 21 point lead in 141-133 loss to Atlanta
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Jalen Johnson had a career-high 30 points and the Atlanta Hawks rallied from a late 21-point deficit by scoring 50 points in the fourth quarter in a 141-133 win over the Chicago Bulls on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: At least 65 million tune in for Netflix NFL Christmas Day games. NBA holiday ratings also skyrocket
item.description: LeBron James and the NBA are going to have make room for the NFL on Christmas. That shouldn't be a problem. Both leagues were winners on Wednesday. Netflix set records as the most-streamed NFL games in U.S. history while the NBA had its best holiday numbers in five years according to Nielsen.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY and TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Holiday Bowl to kick off at brand-new Snapdragon Stadium for the first time
item.description: The Holiday Bowl has been woven into the fabric of San Diego for four decades. For a football city without a professional sports team, there is even more excitement surrounding this annual event.
item.dc:creator: Jaime Chambers, Fox 5

item.title: DIRECTV Holiday Bowl: What to know before going
item.description: It will be the first time the Holiday Bowl is held in Mission Valley — where it had been for more than 40 years — since before the pandemic. The two most recent bowl games were played in Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Holiday Bowl football players visit SeaWorld San Diego
item.description: Football players from the two teams facing off in the DIRECTV Holiday Bowl spent a few hours Wednesday morning celebrating Christmas at SeaWorld San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Reports: Pete Carroll interested in Bears' head-coaching job
item.description: Former Seattle Seahawks head coach Pete Carroll has expressed interest in becoming the next head coach of the Chicago Bears, who are looking to fill their head coaching vacancy for the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Caitlin Clark honored as AP Female Athlete of the Year following her impact on women's sports
item.description: Caitlin Clark raised the profile of women's basketball to unprecedented levels in both the college ranks and the WNBA, and Tuesday she was named the AP Female Athlete of the Year for her impact on and off the court.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC drops second straight home game, 3-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - While the Utah Hockey Club has won seven in a row on the game, the team continues to struggle at home. Roope Hintz scored his team-leading 15th goal of the season, and the Dallas Stars held on to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 at Delta Center on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: GJ Tigers Grant Lewis and Will Weirath shine under varsity spotlight
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Grant Lewis and Will Weirath aren’t your average freshmen. They’re not just competing with older, more experienced players — they’re excelling. Their combined 25-point performance in the Tigers’ recent win highlights their remarkable season.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5
